name: miraie-ac-control
title: MirAIe AC Control
description: Control Panasonic MirAIe air conditioners from Raycast.
author: ayush_saini

commands.name: list-devices
commands.title: View Devices
commands.description: View and control your Panasonic MirAIe air conditioners

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Menu Bar Control
commands.description: Control your Panasonic MirAIe air conditioners from the menu bar

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: Mobile Number / Email
preferences.description: Your MirAIe account mobile number or email address

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
